MINI MINUTES:

Joseph E. Tomask, Esq., Telephone 510-848-0500, appearing for Plaintiff;

Ruling - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MRL DISTRIBUTORS, Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement.

Defendant MRL Distributor, LLC's motion for determination that its settlement with plaintiff Thomas Lewis is in good faith per CCP 877.6 is granted. MRL has adequately addressed all of the applicable Tech-Bilt factors. The ECIG defendants have not shown that the settlement between Mr. Lewis and MRL is outside the ballpark. The amount of the settlement represents a fair approximation of MRL's proportionate share of a judgment notwithstanding the reasonable prospect of a liability finding against MRL given the relatively low medical bills incurred by Mr. Lewis and the substantial possibilities that Mr. Lewis would receive a large award for lost income and a significant percentage of fault would be attributed to him. The absence of any apportionment of the settlement amount between economic and non-economic damages is not a basis to deny this motion. The ECIG defendants have not shown that it is reasonably possible that any discovery they would propound would enable them to successfully oppose this motion. MRL's financial condition is not material since the settlement amount, without consideration of MRL's financial condition, is in the ballpark.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)
